description: A company security policy document is located at /home/ga/Desktop/security_policy.txt. Microsoft Edge on this workstation currently violates this policy. Reconfigure Edge's settings to ensure full compliance with all requirements in the document. Create a compliance confirmation report at /home/ga/Desktop/compliance_report.txt listing each requirement, the specific setting changed, and its location within the Edge Settings interface.

metadata.occupation_context: IT Administrator / Regulatory Affairs Manager - browser security policy enforcement
